name: Frosted Banana Pops
recipeInstructions:
Frosted Banana Pops:
1. Peel the bananas and cut them in half, leaving the stick out.
2. Dip each banana half into the chocolate sauce, then roll in shredded coconut to cover.
3. Wrap a plastic tie bag around the banana, sealing it securely.
4. Freeze the wrapped banana pops until set.
Peanut Butter Banana Pops:
1. Cut the bananas in half and insert a wooden stick into each one.
2. Mix together peanut butter and sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
3. Dip each banana into the peanut butter mixture, then roll in crunchy cereal.
4. Wrap each banana with plastic wrap, securing it tightly.
5. Freeze until set.
